title: Large brownfield change requiring context management across many files
prompt: Refactor the RuntimeStore in src/agent_runtime/ to support multiple named stores per process. Each store should be keyed by a workspace ID string. Update all route handlers in routes.py to accept a workspace_id path parameter, update all tests, update the TypeScript API client and all frontend hooks, and update docs/architecture.md to reflect the new multi-store design.

rubric.notes: Wide-impact refactor touching every layer. Designed to exercise the context health gate: working set should exceed 70% utilization, requiring the orchestrator to trim or compress. Multiple skills expected.
